plan_metadata.name: group fill in azure serarch local

steps.description: Click inside the ".env.local.user" file editor in Visual Studio Code at the end of line 9 (after "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME="), placing the text cursor for editing.
Type #text:"text-embedding-ada-002" into the AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME field in the .env.dev.user file using the Visual Studio Code editor.
Press the Down Arrow key to move the cursor from line 7 to line 8 in the .env.dev.user file within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY}}  in the  file next to AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME, using the Visual Studio Code editor.
Press the Down Arrow key to move the cursor from the end of line 8 to the start of line 9 in the `.env.dev.user` file within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{env:AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT}} into the AZURE_SEARCH_KEY field in the file within Visual Studio Code.
Save changes to the file in Visual Studio Code by pressing Ctrl+S while the file is open and focused in the editor.
Right-click the tab for the file ".env.local.user" in Visual Studio Code to open the context menu for tab actions.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu for the ".env.local.user" file tab in Visual Studio Code to close the file.
